extraction.one_line_summary: BENNETT George won after ARU Fabio attacked and bridged, surviving MAJKA Rafał's final sprint after THOMAS Geraint suffered mechanical at critical moment.
tactical_patterns: BAGIOLI Nicola controlled breakaway KOM point distribution by forcing pre-agreement with MOSCA Jacopo before accelerating.
LANDA Mikel attacked immediately when race leader THOMAS Geraint suffered mechanical, exploiting Sky's momentary weakness.
ARU Fabio regained position after being distanced then counter-attacked showing recovery capacity others lacked on summit.
FROOME Chris sacrificed GC position to pace THOMAS back after mechanical, Sky prioritizing leader defense over individual placement.

rider_signals.BENNETT George: positive: Won summit finish despite being marked by GC contenders, strong positioning throughout finale.
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: positive: Recovered from difficulty mid-climb to launch attack that stuck, unusual resilience for this season.
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: Tactically astute attacking mechanical-stricken leader, gained significant time finishing second on stage.
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: Mechanical at worst moment lost race lead, relied entirely on FROOME Chris pacing to limit losses.
rider_signals.MAJKA Rafał: neutral: Strong sprint finish for second but tactical passivity when ARU attacked suggests defensive mindset.
rider_signals.BAGIOLI Nicola: positive: Three consecutive breakaway days with KOM dominance shows exceptional recovery and tactical consistency.
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: neutral: Sacrificed own GC for team duty pacing THOMAS, demonstrates domestique role despite star status.
rider_signals.HERMANS Ben: negative: Faded badly in final kilometers after being in contention, unable to sustain pace on steep gradient.
